title: Good Habits for an 8 Year Old
subtitle: Simple daily tasks that build independence, kindness, and confidence.

tasks.name: Brush teeth morning and night
tasks.goal: Keep teeth clean and build a reliable routine

tasks.name: Make the bed
tasks.goal: Start the day by finishing one small responsibility

tasks.name: Pack school bag
tasks.goal: Be ready for the next day without rushing

tasks.name: Tidy toys and desk
tasks.goal: Keep spaces calm and easy to use

tasks.name: Drink water
tasks.when: With each meal and after play

tasks.name: Screen-time finish check
tasks.goal: Turn devices off calmly and move to the next activity
